meta.description: Nationwide directory of minority-owned small businesses across all 50 U.S. states.

listings.name: Nourish Kitchen Co.
listings.shortDescription: Farm-to-table soul food rooted in West African and Southern tradition, sourcing from local Georgia farms.
listings.description: A farm-to-table soul food kitchen rooted in West African and Southern tradition. Chef Tamara sources ingredients from local Georgia farms, crafting dishes that are simultaneously ancestral and modern. The Sunday brunch line wraps around the block for good reason.

listings.name: Sol Thread Studio
listings.address: 3212 César Chávez Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90063
listings.shortDescription: Independent fashion label hand-printing bold graphic tees and accessories in a zero-waste studio.
listings.description: An independent fashion label hand-printing bold graphic tees, hoodies, and woven accessories inspired by folk art and contemporary culture. Every garment is screen-printed in-house in a zero-waste studio.

listings.name: Pillar Code Labs
listings.shortDescription: Software consultancy building accessible civic tech and cloud infrastructure for nonprofits.
listings.description: A software consultancy specializing in civic tech, accessibility-first web development, and cloud infrastructure for nonprofits and government agencies. Founded by two Howard University alumni who came up through military service.

listings.name: Golden Roots Wellness
listings.shortDescription: Holistic wellness center grounded in herbalism and integrative medicine led by a naturopathic doctor.
listings.description: A holistic wellness center grounded in herbalism and integrative medicine. Dr. Aisha Bankole, a naturopathic doctor and licensed acupuncturist, offers a full spectrum of services from herbal consultations to massage therapy to community wellness workshops.

listings.name: Three Crowns Bakery
listings.shortDescription: Nigerian-inspired bakery fusing traditional pastry with Houston bold flavor — famous for spiced croissants.
listings.description: This bakery fuses Nigerian pastry tradition with Houston's bold flavor identity. Signature chin-chin, puff-puff, and a smash-hit Nigerian-spiced croissant that sold out for 47 consecutive weekends.

listings.name: Hana Bloom Botanicals
listings.shortDescription: Apothecary making plant-based skincare from Japanese and Korean herbal traditions — small batch, fragrance-free.
listings.description: An apothecary creating small-batch, plant-based skincare drawing from Japanese forest bathing and Korean herbal medicine. Every product is handcrafted, fragrance-free, and formulated for sensitive skin.

listings.name: Libertas Financial Group
listings.shortDescription: Financial planning firm serving first-generation wealth builders with bilingual tax strategy and retirement planning.
listings.description: A financial planning and wealth-building firm serving first-generation wealth builders. Monique Hayes, a Certified Financial Planner, offers tax strategy, retirement planning, and financial literacy workshops in English and Spanish.

listings.name: Kinfolk Apparel
listings.shortDescription: Atlanta streetwear brand designing each drop around a chapter of cultural history, in premium organic cotton.
listings.description: Atlanta-born streetwear brand rooted in cultural history and heritage. Darius Cole designs each drop around a specific historical chapter, rendered in contemporary silhouettes with premium organic cotton.

listings.name: Verdant Acupuncture & Herbs
listings.shortDescription: TCM clinic offering acupuncture, cupping, and sliding-scale community sessions.
listings.description: A Traditional Chinese Medicine clinic offering acupuncture, cupping, herbal medicine, and community acupuncture sliding-scale sessions. Dr. Linh Nguyen was trained in both Hanoi and at AOMA Graduate School of Integrative Medicine.

listings.name: Colorwork Collective
listings.shortDescription: Brand identity and illustration studio whose work has appeared in NYT and Vogue.
listings.description: A creative studio offering brand identity, illustration, mural commissions, and editorial design to businesses prioritizing authentic cultural storytelling. Work has appeared in The New York Times, Vogue, and dozens of nonprofits worldwide.

listings.name: Tecla Technology Solutions
listings.address: 1801 S Blue Island Ave, Chicago, IL 60608
listings.shortDescription: IT firm providing bilingual cybersecurity and cloud services to small businesses.
listings.description: An IT managed services firm providing cybersecurity, cloud migration, and tech support for small businesses — in both English and Spanish. Rosa Méndez started Tecla after recognizing the digital divide leaving many small business owners without infrastructure to compete.

listings.name: Mahogany Beauty Lounge
listings.address: 103 E Ponce de Leon Ave, Decatur, GA 30030
listings.shortDescription: Luxury beauty lounge specializing in natural hair, braiding, and locs — appointments book 6 weeks out.
listings.description: A full-service luxury beauty lounge specializing in natural hair care, braiding, locs, and holistic beauty rituals. Jasmine Carter opened Mahogany after 15 years of building a loyal clientele. Appointments open 6 weeks out.

listings.name: Village Roots Tutoring
listings.address: 2107 Good Hope Rd SE, Washington, DC 20020
listings.shortDescription: Culturally responsive tutoring and college counseling for Title I students in Southeast DC.
listings.description: An education company providing culturally responsive tutoring, SAT prep, and college counseling to students from Title I schools in Southeast DC. Dr. Moore leads a team of 18 educators, all from the communities they serve.

listings.name: Mesa Verde Taqueria
listings.address: 1718 E César Chávez Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90033
listings.shortDescription: Family-run Oaxacan taqueria with masa ground from heirloom corn and a legendary 3-day mole negro.
listings.description: A family-run taqueria serving Oaxacan-inspired street tacos made from masa ground in-house from heirloom corn. Carlos and Elena opened Mesa Verde after years of weekend pop-ups in Boyle Heights. The mole negro here is a 3-day labor of love.

listings.name: Pixel Fox Creative
listings.shortDescription: Freelance motion designer and brand strategist creating visual identities and animated content for brands.
listings.description: A freelance motion designer and brand strategist with 8 years of experience crafting visual identities for startups and established brands. Specializes in logo animation, social content, and brand style guides.

listings.name: Clara Writes
listings.shortDescription: Freelance copywriter and content strategist helping brands find their voice with compelling copy.
listings.description: Award-winning freelance copywriter and content strategist specializing in long-form journalism, brand voice development, and SEO-driven website copy. Clara has written for national publications and helped 60+ small businesses find their voice online.

listings.name: Apex Home Repair
listings.shortDescription: Licensed handyman for drywall, tile, decks, and smart home installs — 20 years experience, always on time.
listings.description: A licensed and insured handyman service handling everything from drywall repair and tile installation to deck building and smart home setup. Mike has 20 years of trade experience and a reputation for showing up on time and getting it done right the first time.

listings.name: Greenleaf Property Services
listings.shortDescription: Family-run property maintenance covering plumbing, electrical, painting, and seasonal upkeep.
listings.description: Family-run property maintenance company offering plumbing fixes, electrical repairs, painting, and seasonal maintenance for homeowners and property managers. Team of 6 skilled tradespeople with a 100% satisfaction guarantee.
